div.div:
eval.yaml
skill: (name)
execution:
mode: case / batch
arguments: "{field}..."
dataset:
path: eval/cases/
schema: "..."
outputs: [{path, schema}]
judges: [{name, type}]
thresholds: {min_pass_rate}
